home-title: Automate your business with AI and custom software
home-text: We build intelligent assistants, automations and integrations that help you sell more, respond faster and save hours of manual work from the first week.
our-services-title: AI, automation and software built to grow
intelligent_chatbots: AI assistants for support and sales
intelligent_chatbots_text: Answer customers, qualify leads, schedule appointments and support users on WhatsApp, web or Instagram with a human tone.
workflow_automation_text: We connect tools, remove repetitive tasks and build workflows so your team works with less friction.
predictive_analytics_text: We organize your data into clear dashboards to track sales, operations, customers and improvement opportunities.
website_creation_text: We build portals, dashboards, booking systems, smart forms and integrations adapted to your business.
content_generation_text: We automate content, commercial follow-up, frequent replies and processes that help attract and convert customers.
tailored_solutions_text: We do not sell closed templates: we analyze your business and build what can actually create impact.
expert_ai_team_text: We combine automation, software and integrations to solve real problems, not just build attractive demos.
measurable_results_text: We prioritize saving time, capturing more opportunities, responding faster and improving daily operations.
contact_us_title: Tell us what you want to automate
get_started_title: Want to sell more, save time or improve operations with AI?
testimonial_1: We automated orders, organized demand and generated statistics to decide what to produce each day. The business now has more control and less improvisation.
testimonial_2: The assistant helps answer frequent questions, organize requests and free up team time without losing closeness with the customer.
testimonial_3: We moved from scattered manual tasks to a clearer flow for responding, following up and not losing opportunities.
testimonial_4: Managing WhatsApp orders was hard to keep organized. With Evolutia AI we have faster replies, better structured orders and data to plan production with more confidence.
testimonial_5: Automation gave us more speed when responding, more order in follow-up and a clearer way to understand what is happening in the business.
